field.title: cpf
field.formula:
IF SUM([followers]) > 0 THEN
    SUM([cost])/ SUM([followers])
END

field.title: title-32026630-999c-11ee-ab83-151fd9ede139
field.formula:
IF [city] = 'ОАЭ' THEN
    [cost]
-- Если делит с городом пополам
ELSEIF ICONTAINS([city], 'ОАЭ+') OR ICONTAINS([city], '+ОАЭ') THEN
    [cost] /2
END
field.guid_formula:
IF [city_6m00] = 'ОАЭ' THEN
    [cost_03ph]
-- Если делит с городом пополам
ELSEIF ICONTAINS([city_6m00], 'ОАЭ+') OR ICONTAINS([city_6m00], '+ОАЭ') THEN
    [cost_03ph] /2
END

field.title: CPF ОАЭ 2
field.formula:
IF SUM([followers]) > 0 THEN
    SUM([cost_uae2])/ SUM([followers])
END
